final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: cinematic-still
Asset type: concept art, atmospheric interior scene
Primary request: dark gothic castle interior with towering vaulted ceilings and blood-red light streaming through stained glass windows
Scene/backdrop: grand medieval castle hall, towering Gothic arches, ornate iron candelabras, hanging chains, heavy shadows
Subject: imposing Gothic architecture with ribbed vaults, flickering candlelight, iron chain decorations
Style/medium: digital painting, gothic horror aesthetic, cinematic concept art
Composition/framing: low-angle wide shot emphasizing vertical scale and vaulted ceiling height
Lighting/mood: blood-red light filtering through stained glass, dramatic chiaroscuro, heavy shadows, flickering candle flames, mysterious and oppressive atmosphere
Color palette: deep crimson red, charcoal black, aged stone gray, warm amber candlelight, blood-red highlights
Materials/textures: rough-hewn stone walls, aged iron chains, leaded stained glass, wax drips on candelabras, worn stone floors
Constraints: maintain the oppressive gothic atmosphere with strong contrast between red light and deep shadows
Avoid: bright cheerful colors, modern elements, clean polished surfaces, cartoonish proportions, lens flare
